checks.label: Documented install and build
checks.configuration_help: Set the repository's reproducible install/build command, args, and timeout_ms.

checks.label: Complete unit suite
checks.configuration_help: Set the complete unit-test command with external boundaries stubbed.

checks.label: Hermetic integration suite
checks.configuration_help: Set integration tests and list every external boundary double.

checks.label: Hermetic system regression
checks.configuration_help: Exercise end-to-end behavior with database, LLM, embedding, HTTP, and other external calls doubled.

checks.label: Local public-seam smoke
checks.public_seam: replace with HTTP, CLI, UI, event, or library seam
checks.safe_local_config: replace with the local-only configuration profile and doubled dependencies
checks.configuration_help: Start safely and exercise approved success and failure journeys through a public seam.

checks.label: Security checks
checks.configuration_help: Set one repository-owned command that runs Gitleaks over Git history, Semgrep with pinned project rules, dependency audit, and applicable container/IaC scans.
